ApiPage.title: REPUTEXA API
ApiPage.subtitle: Wire REPUTEXA into your stack to trigger automated review invites after every customer visit.
ApiPage.noticeTitle: What the REPUTEXA API actually does
ApiPage.noticeBody:
The REPUTEXA API is an inbound webhook: it receives visit payloads from your POS, Zapier, or booking stack and automatically triggers AI Capture — a WhatsApp message 30 minutes after the visit inviting the customer to leave a Google review.

There is still no public read API (GET /reviews, GET /statistics, etc.). Your data lives in the REPUTEXA dashboard.

useCases.title: Point of sale (POS)
useCases.description: Square, SumUp, Lightspeed, or any POS with outbound webhooks. After each closed sale, POST customer data to REPUTEXA so AI Capture schedules WhatsApp 30 minutes later.

useCases.title: Zapier / Make
useCases.description: Connect Shopify, WooCommerce, Airtable, booking forms, etc. Each confirmed visit or order triggers your REPUTEXA endpoint.

useCases.title: Reservation systems
useCases.description: TheFork, Resy, or bespoke booking tools. Fire the invite flow 30 minutes after the reservation time with zero manual work.

ApiPage.keyIntro: Your integration key (<rtx>rtx_live_…</rtx>) is created with a ZENITH workspace. View or rotate it anytime from the dashboard.
ApiPage.keyFootnote: ZENITH is required to mint a key. Legacy DOMINATOR workspaces keep their access.

securityRules.text: rtx_live_ keys are account-scoped — never embed them in public frontends.
REPUTEXA validates the key, enforces E.164 phone numbers, and applies a 120-day minimum gap before re-contacting the same number.
Messages only send between 09:00 and 21:00 Paris time to protect customers.
The same phone number cannot be messaged more than once every five minutes (deduplication).

errorCodes.desc: Payload accepted — job enqueued in review_queue
Missing, invalid, or revoked rtx_live_ key
AI Capture not enabled on this plan (ZENITH required)
Number contacted inside the last five minutes
Too many requests from this IP — retry shortly

ApiPage.zapierExample:
Trigger: Order paid on POS / ecommerce

Action: Webhook by Zapier
  URL     : https://reputexa.fr/api/webhooks/rtx_live_YOUR_KEY
  Method  : POST
  Headers : Content-Type: application/json
  Data    : {
              "customerName": "{{first}} {{last}}",
              "phone": "{{phone_e164}}",
              "visitDate": "{{order_completed_at}}",
              "establishmentId": "YOUR_ESTABLISHMENT_ID"
            }

Result: REPUTEXA queues WhatsApp 30 minutes after the visit.
ApiPage.ctaSubtitle: AI Capture ships with ZENITH. Start the 14-day trial to test against your real traffic.
